name: Magma Domain Spells
description:
Magma Domain always-prepared domain spell source list:
Tier 1: Ray of Sickness, Tasha's Caustic Brew, Melf's Acid Arrow, Ray of Enfeeblement
Tier 2: Stinking Cloud, Elemental Bane (Acid)
Tier 3: Vitriolic Sphere, Transmute Stone to Slag (rework of Transmute Rock)
Tier 4: Cloudkill, Blight of the Ash Wastes (rename of Contagion)
TODO: unsupported spell entities remain preserved in settings/elemental-cleric-spell-source.json.
